summary: Run a UDF (User-Defined Function) or EOAP-CWL workflow
description:
Runs a user-defined function (UDF) or an EOAP-CWL workflow against a data cube.

This backend supports the `EOAP-CWL` runtime. Pass the CWL document as the `udf` parameter and the CWL input values as the `context` parameter.

The endorsed staging pattern is: `load_collection → save_result → context → run_udf(EOAP-CWL)`. The CWL workflow receives files staged by `save_result` and must produce a STAC catalog as output.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The data to process. May be null when using EOAP-CWL with pre-staged inputs.

parameters.name: udf
parameters.description: The UDF code or CWL document to execute. For `EOAP-CWL` runtime: provide the CWL document as an inline YAML/JSON string or a URL pointing to a remote `.cwl` file.

parameters.name: runtime
parameters.description: The UDF runtime identifier. Use `EOAP-CWL` to execute a CWL workflow via Calrissian on Kubernetes.

parameters.name: context
parameters.description: Additional context passed to the UDF. For `EOAP-CWL` runtime: a flat key-value mapping of CWL input parameter names to their values.

returns.description: The processed data cube or CWL workflow outputs.
